channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: Wien Hütteldorf ↔ Wien Penzing
item.description: Due to the extension of the construction works, trains between Wien Penzing Bahnhst and Wien Hütteldorf Bahnhof (U) are currently only limited. [Since 23.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to the extension of the construction works, trains between Wien Penzing Bahnhst and Wien Hütteldorf Bahnhof (U) are currently only limited.
[Since 23.07.2026]

item.title: Wien Schottentor: Schottenring from crossing Universitätsring and Schottengasse and bulkhead passage to crossing Heßgas
item.description: In the working area the tram operation is stopped. [13.07.2026 – 22.08.2026]
item.content:encoded:
In the working area the tram operation is stopped.
[13.07.2026 – 22.08.2026]

item.title: 60A: 60A. Liesing S
item.description: Stop change of line 60A towards Alterlaa U Stop: Liesing S From: Liesinger Platz 2 a, Bussteig B After: Perchtoldsdorfer Straße 2 Duration: From 29. July … [23.07.2026 – 23.07.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Stop change of line 60A towards Alterlaa U Stop: Liesing S From: Liesinger Platz 2 a, Bussteig B After: Perchtoldsdorfer Straße 2 Duration: From 29. July …
[23.07.2026 – 23.07.2027]

item.title: 61A: Liesing S
item.description: Stop change of line 61A towards Vösendorf-Siebenhirten Stop: Liesing S From: Liesinger square 2, Bussteig A After: Liesinger square 1 Duration: From 29. July … [23.07.2026 – 23.07.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Stop change of line 61A towards Vösendorf-Siebenhirten Stop: Liesing S From: Liesinger square 2, Bussteig A After: Liesinger square 1 Duration: From 29. July …
[23.07.2026 – 23.07.2027]

item.title: 12A/14A: demonstration on 24.07.2026
item.description: Due to an demonstration, the following transport measures are taken. [23.07.2026 – 24.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to an demonstration, the following transport measures are taken.
[23.07.2026 – 24.07.2026]

item.title: 1/2/3A/71/D: demonstration on 2507.2026
item.description: Because of an demonstration at the ring, the following traffic measures are taken. [22.07.2026 – 25.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of an demonstration at the ring, the following traffic measures are taken.
[22.07.2026 – 25.07.2026]

item.title: 11X/4A/N29: Löwengasse
item.description: Stop change of lines 1 and N29 towards Stefan-Fadinger-Platz or Floridsdorf S U Stop: Löwengasse From: Rasumovskygasse 2 To: Löwengasse 47–51 Duration … [22.07.2026 – 22.07.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Stop change of lines 1 and N29 towards Stefan-Fadinger-Platz or Floridsdorf S U Stop: Löwengasse From: Rasumovskygasse 2 To: Löwengasse 47–51 Duration …
[22.07.2026 – 22.07.2027]

item.title: U1: Folding ramp lock on 30.07.2026
item.description: Due to the high passenger volume associated with an event, the folding ramps of the U1 underground trains cannot be extended. [22.07.2026 – 31.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to the high passenger volume associated with an event, the folding ramps of the U1 underground trains cannot be extended.
[22.07.2026 – 31.07.2026]
